title: desmodium repens
intro: Desmodium repens, also known as tick trefoil or creeping tick clover, is a perennial legume native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Desmodium repens include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. Desmodium repens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
